title: Magdalen College School (Brackley): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Magdalen College School  URN: 139158  Notice issued to: Magdalen College School Brackley Academy Trust  Reason for issue: ‘special measures’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Carol Gray  DfE regional director office: East Midlands  Local authority: West Northamptonshire "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
